pi_items.source: ADAudit Plus application URL routing convention

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring the 'ServiceDesk Plus' integration in ADAudit Plus using entirely synthetic parameters (Server Name: 'sdp.corpnet.local', Port: '8080', Protocol: 'HTTP', Auth Key: '6A2F8D4E-91BC-43D7-A5E0-7C3B12F689D4'). The target URL is 'http://localhost:8081'. The initial admin login credentials claimed in the task description ('admin'/'admin') are incorrect; the environment setup scripts (install_adaudit_plus.ps1) automatically change the initial password to 'Admin@2024' before the task begins. Furthermore, the task's programmatic verification is broken because the 'setup_task.ps1' and 'export_result.ps1' hook scripts specified in the task hooks are missing from the environment, meaning the 'task_result.json' required by the verifier is never generated. The verifier will fall back exclusively to VLM scoring of final trajectory screenshots.
